calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: SD-015 handcrafted goal cue diagnostic -- oracle vs absent
items.notes: EXP-0091. Critical diagnostic: if E3 cannot exploit a perfect oracle goal signal, selection mechanism is broken. If it can, representation is the bottleneck.

items.title: MECH-153 validation: supervised context-labeling for E1 ContextMemory
items.notes: MECH-153 validation. Adds terrain_loss (supervised hazard-field label, lambda=0.1) to E1 training with sd016_enabled=True. Re-runs EXQ-181b diagnostic on extract_cue_context() outputs. Baseline: EXQ-181b cosine_sim=0.9999 without supervised training. PASS if cosine_sim < 0.85 + terrain_weight accuracy > 70% + harm_r2 > 0.3.

items.title: Direct terrain pathway with phased training (MECH-152 isolation)
items.note: Fixes EXQ-194 MIXED: (1) phased training (P0 E1+E2 warmup 200eps, P1 frozen-encoder TerrainHead 100eps, P2 collection 100eps) per 166e lesson; (2) corrected w_goal threshold (< 0.33 not < 0.1). Bypasses ContextMemory with standalone TerrainHead.
